name: Judy's Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the chocolate in 1/4 cup of water over low heat until melted and cooled.
2. Cream butter and sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, creaming well after each egg is added.
4. Mix in the melted chocolate.
5. In a separate bowl, blend flour, baking powder, and salt with a fork.
6. Alternately add the flour mixture and milk to the butter mixture with an electric mixer. Blend well.
7. Add the flavorings (vanilla and almond extract) and mix thoroughly.
8. Pour the batter into a greased and floured Bundt or tube pan.
9. Bake in a 325 degree oven for one hour and fifteen minutes.
10. Allow the cake to cool on a cake rack for 20 minutes, then loosen it with a knife around the sides of the pan.
11. Let the cake cool another 30 minutes before removing from the cake pan.
This cake really doesn't need frosting; you might want to dust lightly with powdered sugar.
